agtech.title: The engineering behind MetaBuilderPRO
agtech.p1: AGTech is a software engineering and innovation lab focused on developing high-performance MetadataTechs.
agtech.p2: Our mission is to build the invisible technological infrastructure that allows complex ecosystems to operate with maximum efficiency, security, and data intelligence.
agtech.p3: We combine robust architectures with user-centric design to deliver tools that truly transform the operational routine.
agtech.cta_label: WANT TO ELEVATE THE TECHNOLOGY LEVEL OF YOUR PROJECT?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.item1_desc: When using login or filling in your BYODB credentials, we only collect essential data (name, email, and infrastructure keys) for authentication and system technical operation purposes.
privacy.item2_desc: Your data is used exclusively to authenticate your access, synchronize your records privately within your own structure (Supabase), and allow interaction with the engine's Artificial Intelligence.
privacy.item3_desc: Important: Your API keys and sensitive metadata are managed locally by the CLI Agent and are never sent to our central servers. This ensures total sovereignty over your data.
privacy.item4_desc: We only use strictly necessary cookies to keep your session active and save your theme preferences (Dark Mode). All communication is encrypted via TLS 1.3.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.item1_desc: By accessing this application, you agree to comply with these terms of service and all applicable laws regarding development and data protection (LGPD).
terms.item2_desc: MetaBuilderPRO is an automation and technical aid tool. Architecture decisions and final implementation must be mandatory reviewed by a responsible human developer.
terms.item3_desc: Access is personal and non-transferable. The user is solely responsible for the security of their API keys and database credentials (Bring Your Own Database).
terms.item4_desc: All MetaBuilderPRO design and branding are owned by AGTech. The code generated by the engine in your infrastructure remains in your possession and responsibility.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Account settings
profile.avatar_hint: Upload a JPG, PNG or GIF image.

hero.subtitle: The ultimate engine for generating dynamic, database-driven CRUD applications without ever touching physical file generation. Connect your enterprise DB securely.

features.dynamic_desc: Introspect your database and map schemas in real-time. No manual mapping required.
features.nocode_desc: Run your entire CRUD via metadata engine dynamically. Changes reflect instantly.
features.enterprise_desc: Local CLI agents to connect to on-premise databases (Oracle, SAP) securely.

dashboard.manage_workspaces: Manage your workspaces and data architectures.
dashboard.create_environment: Create an environment for your company.
dashboard.slug_hint: This will be the public address for your projects.
dashboard.delete_desc: All projects and data in this environment will be permanently removed.

projects.title: Projects in
projects.subtitle: Manage all apps and database connections in this workspace. Each project can have its own CLI Agent and metadata structure.
projects.desc_placeholder: Ex: Sales management and funnel system.
projects.icon_hint: Insert SVG code to customize the project icon.
projects.delete_project_desc: All models and data of this project will be permanently removed.
projects.status_desc: Determine if the project is accessible.
projects.use_cases_subtitle: All published interfaces for this project.
projects.delete_view_desc: This action will permanently remove the interface. Database data will not be affected.

studio.title: MetaBuilder Studio
studio.subtitle: Configure your application screens. Choose synchronized tables and define how data should be displayed to your users.

delete_confirm.title: Confirm Deletion
delete_confirm.desc: You are about to delete the use case "{name}". All associated components will also be removed.

auth.title: Configure Login
auth.managed_desc: MetaBuilder manages users in an isolated database. Fast and easy.
auth.database_desc: The CLI Agent validates login against YOUR synchronized users table.
auth.ldap_desc: Native corporate integration. Validation via client's Active Directory.
auth.managed_ready_desc: We will automatically create the table and login/registration APIs. No additional configuration is required.
auth.default_welcome_desc: Enter your credentials to access the portal.

config.title: Screen Configurator
config.db_fields_desc: Customize labels and visibility for fields in table {table}.
config.add_virtual_field_desc: Create action buttons or calculated fields.

builder.title: Use Case Builder
builder.subtitle: New Use Case
builder.step_logic_title: What is the logic of your use case?
builder.step_logic_desc: Define the main behavior of this screen in MetaBuilder.
builder.logic_research_only_desc: Focused on searching and visualizing data.
builder.logic_research_registration_desc: Full flow: search, listing, and form.
builder.step_tables_desc: You can select one or more tables. Join logic will be configured next.
builder.multi_tables_alert: You selected {count} tables. In the next step, we will define the relations (Joins) between them.
builder.step_layout_desc: Organize fields into specific zones. A field can be in more than one zone.
builder.step_actions_desc: Configure how data will be retrieved and which buttons will be available.
builder.dynamic_query_desc: MetaBuilder generates Joins and Selects based on table relations.
builder.manual_query_desc: You write the pure SQL for more control and performance.
builder.fill_name_slug: Please fill in the name and slug of the screen.

app.project_inactive_desc: This application has been temporarily disabled by the workspace administrator.

delete_confirm.title: Delete Record
delete_confirm.desc: This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove data from the database.

logic.title: What is the logic of your use case?
logic.subtitle: Define the main behavior of this screen in MetaBuilder.

pesquisa.title: Search Only
pesquisa.desc: Focused on searching and viewing data.

pesquisa_cadastro.title: Search + Registration
pesquisa_cadastro.desc: Full flow: search, listing, and form.

mapa_mental.title: Mind Map
mapa_mental.desc: Hierarchical visualization and connections between data.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.desc: Workflow management by columns and status.

master_detail.title: Master-Detail
master_detail.desc: Deep relational explorer with tabs and data groupings.

tables.title: Which tables make up this case?
tables.subtitle: You can select one or more tables. Join logic will be configured next.
tables.selected_warning: You selected {count} tables. In the next step, we will define the relationships (Joins) between them.

layout.title: Design the Screen Layout
layout.subtitle: Organize fields into specific zones. A field can be in more than one zone.
layout.relationships_desc: You selected multiple tables. Define how they connect (Joins).

kanban.title: Kanban Configuration
kanban.group_placeholder: Select a field to define columns...
kanban.group_desc: This field will determine the Kanban columns (e.g., Status, Stage).

master_detail.title: Master-Detail Configuration
master_detail.subtitle: Define the hierarchy and navigation style of the data.

mindmap.central_desc: This field will be the root of your mind map. The fields selected in Zone 02 will form the next levels.

drawer.title: Properties
drawer.required_desc: Validate if the field is filled

layout.reset_confirm: Do you want to reset all custom formatting for all fields? This action cannot be undone.

actions.title: Query & Final Actions
actions.subtitle: Configure how data will be retrieved and which buttons will be available.

dynamic_query.title: Dynamic Query (Automatic)
dynamic_query.desc: MetaBuilder generates Joins and Selects based on table relationships.

raw_sql.title: Manual SQL (Raw SQL)
raw_sql.desc: You write raw SQL for greater control and performance.

validation.grid_required: Select at least one field for the Grid listing.
validation.filter_required: You have enabled arguments. Select at least one Filter field.
validation.form_required: Select at least one field for the Form.
validation.name_slug_required: Please fill in the name and slug for the use case.

hero.badge: The Software Engine of the Future
hero.title: Build
hero.subtitle: Apps in Seconds.
hero.desc: Accelerate your technical delivery with MetaBuilderPRO. Connect legacy databases, use AI to generate premium interfaces, and manage multiple projects in a single whitelabel platform.

home.bento_desc: Forget boilerplate. Focus on what matters: your client's business logic.
home.bridge_desc: MetaBuilderPRO connects to your current SQL database and generates a complete administrative interface in minutes, without touching a single line of your current structure.
home.zero_trust_desc: Unlike other tools, MetaBuilderPRO doesn't connect to your database. It sends encrypted commands to your local tunnel, which processes the information.
home.wizard_desc: Don't waste time drawing grids and forms one by one. Our intelligent assistant creates complete CRUD, Master-Detail, and Dashboard flows based on your database semantics.
home.whitelabel_desc: MetaBuilderPRO disappears so your brand can shine. Dynamic favicons, custom URLs, and specific themes for each project you host on the platform.
home.cta_desc: Accelerate your technical delivery and delight your clients with premium interfaces.

speed.title: Develop. at the speed of thought.
speed.desc: MetaBuilderPRO was designed to eliminate repetitive web development tasks.
speed.item1_desc: Configure forms, grids, and filters by answering simple questions.
speed.item2_desc: Our AI analyzes your database and automatically suggests the best configurations.
speed.item3_desc: Changes reflect immediately in the runtime environment.

integration.title: Where your data. already is.
integration.desc: Don't waste resources on risky migrations. Ultra-modern interface layer over your SQL databases.
integration.item1_desc: Keep using your native Procedures, Triggers, and Views.
integration.item2_desc: Your data never leaves your local infrastructure.
integration.supported_engines: Compatible with the main database engines on the market.

branding.title: Your Brand. Your Rules.
branding.desc: Total Whitelabel. Each project with its own dynamic visual identity.
branding.item1_desc: Each project injects its own favicon and logo in real-time.
branding.item2_desc: Define specific font families for each brand.
branding.item3_desc: Native support for Light and Dark mode per project.

zero_trust.title: Architecture. Zero-Trust Bridge.
zero_trust.desc: Connect your cloud interface to your local database without exposing network ports.
zero_trust.item1_desc: Optimized binaries for Windows and Linux. Run where your database is.
zero_trust.item2_desc: The local executable is the only one that has the database password.
zero_trust.item3_desc: WebSockets to ensure minimum latency and fluid experience.
zero_trust.it_item1: Does not require opening inbound ports.
zero_trust.it_item3: Credentials never leave the client's infra.
zero_trust.it_item4: Auditable: SQL commands pass through the local tunnel.

security.title: Unshakeable. Security.
security.desc: Total protection for your customers' data. Choose between multiple authentication strategies and ensure that only those who should, access what they can.
security.auth_desc: Support for BCrypt, MD5, SHA256 and more.
security.item1_desc: All communication between the Runtime and your database is protected by layers of TLS encryption.
security.item2_desc: Integrated tools for managing cookies, terms of use and privacy policies.
security.footer_desc: Implement bank-level security in your systems in just a few clicks.
